headline: EQT Benefits From Rising Power Demand and Appalachian Basin Strength
summary: EQT rides on rising natural gas demand from AI, data centers and coal retirements, with Appalachian assets positioning it to capture long-term growth.

headline: Seer Joins Thermo Fisher Tools In Large-Scale Proteomics Effort
summary: Seer Proteograph platform joins Singapore study to profile 10,000 samples, integrating data for disease research and risk modeling.
